title: T-060 — ALTER tenant_idp_config: add 11 missing F-A2 columns
prompt:
# T-060 — ALTER tenant_idp_config: add 11 missing F-A2 columns

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §8.x (Multi-tenant + tenant_idp_config F-A2), §13 (F-U5 password lifecycle)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-prd-drift-audit.md` Critical drift #2
Severity: P0 (Wave-B blocker — T-011/T-012/T-013 cannot land cleanly without these columns)

## Goal
Add the 11 missing F-A2 columns to `tenant_idp_config` via a follow-up migration `016-tenant-idp-config-fa2-columns.sql`. Specifically: SAML cols (`metadata_url`, `entity_id`, `x509_cert`, `provider_label`), SCIM cols (`scim_token_hash`, `scim_token_last_four`), JIT col (`jit_provisioning`), enforcement col (`enforce_for_non_admins`), and password-lifecycle cols (`password_expiry_days`, plus `created_at` and `updated_at` if absent, with an `updated_at` trigger).

## Implementation contract
Create `packages/db/migrations/016-tenant-idp-config-fa2-columns.sql` with `ALTER TABLE "public"."tenant_idp_config"` statements:

SAML columns:
- `add column metadata_url text` (URL to SAML metadata XML)
- `add column entity_id text` (SAML entity ID)
- `add column x509_cert text` (PEM-encoded X.509 certificate)
- `add column provider_label text` (display label, e.g., "Acme SSO")

SCIM columns:
- `add column scim_token_hash text` (bcrypt or argon2 hash of SCIM bearer token)
- `add column scim_token_last_four text` (last 4 chars for UI display)

JIT/enforcement columns:
- `add column jit_provisioning boolean not null default false`
- `add column enforce_for_non_admins boolean not null default false`

Password lifecycle:
- `add column password_expiry_days integer not null default 0` (0 = never, per NIST)
- `add column if not exists created_at timestamptz not null default now()` (only if missing)
- `add column if not exists updated_at timestamptz not null default now()` (only if missing)

Add a trigger on UPDATE that sets `updated_at = now()` (use `BEFORE UPDATE FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION app.touch_updated_at()` if `app.touch_updated_at()` exists; otherwise create a one-line trigger function in the same migration).

Preserve all existing columns and existing F-U5 seed defaults.

Update STATUS.md migration ordering lock to include 016.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/016-tenant-idp-config-fa2-columns.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config-fa2.integration.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config.integration.test.ts [modify — extend assertions for new columns if applicable]
- packages/db/schema/tenant-idp-config.ts [modify if Drizzle TS schema needs to mirror — verify if the Drizzle schema for this table exists]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/00-foundation/STATUS.md [modify — migration ordering lock]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 016, when runner applies it, then information_schema.columns lists all 11 added columns; AND Given existing rows, when 016 applies, then existing column data is preserved.
2. Given JIT/enforcement defaults, when a fresh row is inserted, then jit_provisioning=false AND enforce_for_non_admins=false AND password_expiry_days=0.
3. Given updated_at trigger, when UPDATE modifies any column, then updated_at advances automatically; AND Given the integration test, when pnpm test runs, then it passes.
4. Given SCIM columns, when a token is provisioned, then scim_token_hash accepts bcrypt-style hash and scim_token_last_four accepts 4 chars.
## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/__tests__/tenant-idp-config-fa2.integration.test.ts` asserts each of the 11 columns exists in `information_schema.columns` and that defaults match; asserts `updated_at` advances on UPDATE.
- Pin SQLSTATE on any expected-failure cases (`23502` NOT NULL, `23503` FK, `23514` CHECK).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test` after GREEN.

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT modify `005-tenant-idp-config.sql` in-place; this is an additive ALTER migration.
- Do NOT change defaults of pre-existing columns (`mfa_required`, `mfa_required_for_roles`, `idle_timeout_min`, `session_max_h`, `password_complexity`).
- Do NOT use bare `.rejects.toThrow()` in tests — pin SQLSTATE.
- Do NOT skip the updated_at trigger (PRD §8.x requires it).
- Do NOT add CHECK constraints on `password_expiry_days` that would reject 0 (0 = never, per NIST).
- Do NOT bypass the migration runner from T-054.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED column-existence + trigger test before migration) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.details:
Create migration 016 with ALTER TABLE statements adding metadata_url, entity_id, x509_cert, provider_label, scim_token_hash, scim_token_last_four, jit_provisioning (default false), enforce_for_non_admins (default false), password_expiry_days (default 0), created_at and updated_at if absent, plus a BEFORE UPDATE trigger setting updated_at=now(). Do not modify 005 in place.

AC count consolidated from 6→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
out_of_scope: Do not change defaults of pre-existing columns.
Do not implement T-011/T-012/T-013 endpoints (separate tasks).
Do not implement password-policy enforcement (T-061 owns).

Given JIT/enforcement defaults, when a fresh row is inserted, then jit_provisioning=false AND enforce_for_non_admins=false AND password_expiry_days=0.
Given updated_at trigger, when UPDATE modifies any column, then updated_at advances automatically; AND Given the integration test, when pnpm test runs, then it passes.
Given SCIM columns, when a token is provisioned, then scim_token_hash accepts bcrypt-style hash and scim_token_last_four accepts 4 chars.

Pin SQLSTATE on any expected-failure cases.

Do not bypass the T-054 migration runner.
